name: Bagisto Open Source Laravel E-Commerce API
what_it_does: Open-source Laravel-based e-commerce platform with GraphQL and REST API — enabling developers to build customizable multi-store e-commerce applications with product catalog management, order management, customer management, inventory, payments, and multi-currency/multi-language support, deployable on-premises or cloud with full source code access.
use_cases: Building custom headless e-commerce storefronts using Bagisto GraphQL API for Next.js/Vue frontends
Managing product catalog, categories, and inventory via Bagisto API for PIM integration
Processing orders and customer data via Bagisto REST API for OMS integration
Integrating Bagisto with payment gateways (Stripe, PayPal, Razorpay) via API extensions
Managing multi-store and multi-currency configurations via Bagisto admin API
not_for: Non-PHP/Laravel organizations (Bagisto requires PHP expertise for customization)
Enterprise scale without dedicated Laravel developers
Organizations needing SaaS e-commerce without server management (use Shopify or BigCommerce)
best_when: A Laravel development agency or PHP-centric organization needs a fully customizable, open-source e-commerce foundation — avoiding Shopify/BigCommerce transaction fees and having full control over code and infrastructure.
avoid_when: You don't have PHP/Laravel expertise, need out-of-the-box SaaS features without development, or need enterprise-level scalability from day one.

auth.notes: Laravel Sanctum API tokens for REST API. OAuth2 via Laravel Passport for user auth. Bearer token auth. Store-scoped access. No webhooks in core (Laravel Events can be configured). GraphQL API for storefront queries. REST Admin API for backend operations. Open source (MIT license) — full source code access. Self-hosted or cloud-deployed. Payment gateway integration via Bagisto extension marketplace.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Open source MIT license — free forever for self-hosted
pricing.paid_tiers: Bagisto Cloud from $29/month; Extensions from Marketplace (individual pricing); Enterprise support contact sales
pricing.notes: Indian company (Jaipur). Founded 2018 by Webkul Software. Open source (MIT license). GitHub 17,000+ stars. Webkul is a Magento Gold Solution Partner with 8,000+ extensions. Bagisto started as answer to Magento's complexity. Laravel PHP framework foundation. 50,000+ stores powered by Bagisto. Strong in India, Southeast Asia, and Latin America. Extension marketplace for payment gateways, shipping, marketplaces. Multi-vendor marketplace as premium feature. B2B features: company accounts, quotes, approval workflows.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: GraphQL + REST API. Laravel Sanctum token auth. Good developer documentation (devdocs.bagisto.com). No core webhooks — custom via Laravel Events. Open source allows full debugging. PHP/Laravel developer required. Self-hosted means no rate limits beyond infrastructure. Indian company with GDPR awareness for EU deployments.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Product reads fully idempotent. Order reads idempotent by order ID. Customer reads idempotent. Order creation requires idempotency key implementation at application layer.
known_agent_gotchas: PHP/Laravel developer required — not a hosted SaaS with turnkey API
No core webhooks — implement via Laravel Events/Observers for event-driven integration
GraphQL and REST APIs exist — GraphQL preferred for storefront, REST for admin
Self-hosted rate limits depend on server infrastructure
Extension marketplace quality varies — audit security of third-party extensions

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced (deployment-controlled). GDPR compliant (operator responsibility). Self-hosted — full data residency control. Laravel Sanctum tokens. Open source MIT license allows full security audit. PCI-DSS for payment handling requires proper configuration. Laravel security patches via Composer updates. Third-party extension security must be independently audited. Indian company — assess for EU GDPR adequacy when using cloud services.
